rules.name: Standard
rules.fullDesc: This army is fielded exactly as presented in this Codex with no changes.

rules.name: Ambushers
rules.shortDesc: All Infantry gain Infiltrate (or Outflank if already have it).
rules.fullDesc: All Infantry models in your army gain Infiltrate. If they already have Infiltrate they gain Outflank instead.

rules.name: Indirect Tactics
rules.shortDesc: All Infantry cannot Claim or Contest Objectives in your Deployment Zone.
rules.fullDesc: All Infantry models in your army cannot Claim or Contest Objective Markers in your Deployment Zone.

rules.name: Lost Home World
rules.shortDesc: Models count as half for Contesting, suffer Ld-1.
rules.fullDesc: Models in your army count as half a model for Contesting Objective Markers and suffer Ld-1.

rules.name: Swordwind
rules.shortDesc: Reroll 1s To Hit; if already do, reroll 2s.
rules.fullDesc: All models in your army may reroll 1s To Hit. Models that can already reroll 1s To Hit instead reroll 2s To Hit.

rules.name: Lost Home World
rules.shortDesc: Models count as half for Contesting, suffer Ld-1.
rules.fullDesc: Models in your army count as half a model for Contesting Objective Markers and suffer Ld-1.

rules.name: Reliance on the Dead
rules.fullDesc: Wraith models in your army gain Objective Secured.

rules.name: Isolationists
rules.shortDesc: All Infantry gain Stealth (or Shroud if already have it).
rules.fullDesc: All infantry models in your army gain Stealth. If they already had Stealth, they swap it for Shroud instead.

rules.name: Lost Home World
rules.shortDesc: Models count as half for Contesting, suffer Ld-1.
rules.fullDesc: Models in your army count as half a model for Contesting Objective Markers and suffer Ld-1.

rules.name: Wild Riders
rules.shortDesc: Models with Steed may be taken as a Troop choice.
rules.fullDesc: Models with Steed may be taken as a Troop Choice.

rules.name: Reckless Assault
rules.shortDesc: Steed models charging into Cover must take Dangerous Terrain tests.
rules.fullDesc: Models with Steed that Declare a Charge against models in Cover must take a Dangerous Terrain test after they move into Base Contact. If they have to Consolidate during the Melee, each Consolidating model must take a Dangerous Terrain test each time.

rules.name: Prescience
rules.fullDesc: For every 1000 points your force is allotted, you may redeploy 1 unit after Deployment but before Infiltrators are placed.

rules.name: Psychic Dependence
rules.shortDesc: When a Psyker is slain, friendly units within 6" take a Pinning Test.
rules.fullDesc: If a model with Psychic Mastery Level is slain, all friendly units within 6" must take a Pinning Test.

armyRules.name: Blind
armyRules.shortDesc: All charges against this model are Disorganized Charges.
armyRules.fullDesc: All charges against this model are considered Disorganized Charges.

armyRules.name: Exposed Transport
armyRules.shortDesc: Glances/Penetrations on 4+ cause Mortal Wounds to Embarked models. Embarked models can fight in Melee.
armyRules.fullDesc: For each Unsaved Glance or Penetration against this model, roll a d6. On a 4+ one Embarked model suffers 1 Mortal Wound instead. If there are no Embarked models, this model suffers damage like normal. In Melee, models Embarked on this one may fight as if they were not Embarked, and enemy units can target them in Melee as if they were not Embarked.

armyRules.name: Harlequin
armyRules.shortDesc: This model does not use your army's Craft World rules.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model does not use the Craft World rules your army follows.

armyRules.name: Wraith
armyRules.fullDesc: A keyword denoting Wraith units. Relevant to Iyanden Craft World rules and Spiritseer abilities.

armyRules.name: Weapons Platform
armyRules.shortDesc: Treated as Monstrous Infantry for Moving and Shooting.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model is considered to be a Monstrous Infantry for the purpose of Moving and Shooting or Shooting in Melee.

armyRules.name: Prism
armyRules.shortDesc: Other Prism weapons in range may sacrifice their shot to boost this one.
armyRules.fullDesc: Any other Prism weapon within weapons range and Line of Sight may give up its shot to add S+2 Heavy+1 to this attack. If Strength reaches 13+ treat it as Destroyer instead.

armyRules.name: Path of Command
armyRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit.
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit.

armyRules.name: Skyleap
armyRules.shortDesc: If not engaged in Melee, may return to Reserves at end of Movement Phase.
armyRules.fullDesc: If this model is not engaged in Melee it may go back into Reserves at the end of your Movement Phase.

armyRules.name: Inescapable Accuracy
armyRules.shortDesc: May reroll Snap Shots including Overwatch.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may reroll Snap Shots, including Overwatch.

armyRules.name: Follower of Ynnead
armyRules.shortDesc: Not affected by your Craft World rules.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model is not affected by your Craft World rules.

armyRules.name: Rampage
armyRules.shortDesc: Gains A+d3 if outnumbered in Melee.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model gains A+d3 if outnumbered in Melee.

armyRules.name: Daemonic Avatar
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 4+ Invulnerability Save.

armyRules.name: Titanic God Engine
armyRules.shortDesc: May ignore all non-Titanic models and Terrain for movement.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may ignore all Non-Titanic models and Terrain for the purposes of Moving, Advancing, Falling Back, and Charging.

armyRules.name: Create Panic
armyRules.shortDesc: Displaces all models up to 1" when moving.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model displaces all models when it moves, place them up to 1" away. Immobile units prevent this model from moving there.

armyRules.name: Phoenix Lord
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 3+ Invulnerability Save.

armyRules.name: Weapon Platform
armyRules.shortDesc: This model may move and shoot this weapon without penalty.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may move and shoot Heavy weapons without the normal To Hit penalty for moving.

commonWargear.name: Pulse Laser and Plasma Missile Launcher
Phantom Glaive and 2 Linked Pulse Lasers

rules: Ignores Terrain and Models for Moving, Advancing, Charging, and Falling Back
Immune to Perils of the Warp
Ignores Terrain and Models for Moving, Advancing, Charging, and Falling Back
May treat Crew Stun as Weapon Disabled
May treat Crew Stun as Weapon Disabled
May Pivot immediately after resolving Shooting attacks
Target unit may reroll all failed Saves until your next Psychic Phase

spirit-stones.label: Spirit Stones
spirit-stones.note: May treat Crew Stun as Weapon Disabled results.

vectored-engines.label: Vectored Engines
vectored-engines.note: May Pivot immediately after resolving Shooting attacks in your Shooting Phase.

ghosthelm-upgrade.label: Ghosthelm
ghosthelm-upgrade.note: Immune to Perils of the Warp.

jetbike.label: Jetbike
jetbike.note: M+4, T+1, W+1. Gain Steed, Deepstrike, Fly, Very Bulky.

warp-jump-generator-upgrade.label: Warp Jump Generator
warp-jump-generator-upgrade.note: Ignores Terrain and Models for movement. May choose to move up to +2d6" instead of normal Movement — if so, unit takes a Dangerous Terrain Test.

simmerfield.label: Simmerfield
simmerfield.note: This model's unit gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save.

runes-of-fate.name: Horrify
runes-of-fate.description: Target unit must cancel an ongoing friendly Aura of their choice.

runes-of-fate.name: Quicken and Restrain
runes-of-fate.description: Quicken: Target unit may reroll failed Charges until your next Psychic Phase. Restrain: Target unit moves at half speed in the Movement Phase until your next Psychic Phase.

runes-of-fate.name: Conceal and Reveal
runes-of-fate.description: Conceal: Target unit gains Stealth until your next Psychic Phase. Reveal: Target unit suffers -1 to Cover Saves until your next Psychic Phase.

runes-of-fate.name: Impair Senses
runes-of-fate.description: Place a 10" Blast Template as an Impairing Cloud. Any non-Eldar shooting in to, out of, or through this cloud suffers -1 To Hit and +1" to Scatter distance. Remove at the start of your next Psychic Phase.

runes-of-fate.name: Enhance and Drain
runes-of-fate.description: Enhance: Target unit gains +1 To Hit in Melee until your next Psychic Phase. Drain: Target NonTitanic unit suffers -1 To Hit in Melee until your next Psychic Phase.

masque-spells.name: Twilight Pathways
masque-spells.description: Target unit may reroll failed Charges until your next Psychic Phase.

masque-spells.name: Mirror of Minds
masque-spells.description: Target one model. Both models roll a d6 and add their Ld. If this model's score is higher, target suffers 2 Mortal Wounds.

masque-spells.name: Shard of Light
masque-spells.description: Target nonTitanic unit suffers -1 To Hit until your next Psychic Phase.

masque-spells.name: Veil of Tears
masque-spells.description: Target unit gains a 4+ Cover Save until your next Psychic Phase.

masque-spells.name: Webway Dance
masque-spells.description: Target friendly unit with Deepstrike or Outflank is placed back in Reserves.

options.label: Swap any Shuriken Pistol for Fusion Pistol
Swap any Shuriken Pistol for melee weapon
Swap Shuriken Pistol for Neuro Disrupter

inlineRules.name: Communion with the Dead
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target Wraith unit gains 5+ Feel No Pain.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: target Wraith unit gains 5+ Feel No Pain.

inlineRules.name: Choreographer of War
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may reroll all failed To Wound rolls in Melee.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may reroll all failed To Wound rolls in Melee.

inlineRules.name: Autarch of Mymeara
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may move d6" after Shooting.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may move d6" after Shooting in the Shooting Phase.

inlineRules.name: Reckless Tactics
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit gain Counterattack.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit gain Counterattack.

inlineRules.name: Cursed
inlineRules.shortDesc: Saves of natural 6s against Melee attacks must be rerolled.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Saves of natural 6s this model makes against Melee attacks must be rerolled.

inlineRules.name: Daemonic Thirst
inlineRules.shortDesc: Inflicts a Mortal Wound on bearer each Command Phase if no Wound was caused last Turn.
inlineRules.fullDesc: A weapon with this rule inflicts a Mortal Wound on its bearer in each of your Command Phases if you did not cause a Wound with the weapon during the last Turn. This does not trigger on Turn 1. If you roll a 1 for Extra Attack you may make no attacks this Melee phase and suffer 1 Mortal Wound.

inlineRules.name: Herald of Ynnead
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit and To Wound.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Hit and To Wound.

inlineRules.name: Bonesing
inlineRules.shortDesc: 12" Aura: target Vehicle or Wraith model Repairs or Heals 1 Wound. On 5+ restore secondary service from Penetration Result.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" Aura: target Vehicle or Wraith model Repairs or Heals 1 Wound. Roll a d6, on a 5+ restore secondary service from a Vehicle Penetration Result, but not the additional lost Wounds.

inlineRules.name: Jester of Death
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit must take a Fear Test.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: target unit must take a Fear Test.

inlineRules.name: Role of Slaanesh
inlineRules.shortDesc: Cannot join units or be targeted by Auras. May reroll failed Charge rolls.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model cannot join units and may not be targeted by any Auras. This model may reroll failed Charge rolls.

inlineRules.name: Master of Pathfinders
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Wound with ranged attacks.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit may reroll 1s To Wound with ranged attacks.

inlineRules.name: Sharpshot
inlineRules.shortDesc: May reroll all failed To Hit rolls with ranged attacks.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may reroll all failed To Hit rolls with ranged attacks.

inlineRules.name: Champion of Ynnead
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit gains a 5+ Feel No Pain.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit gains a 5+ Feel No Pain.

inlineRules.name: Warden of Yvraine
inlineRules.shortDesc: Gains Bodyguard, but only to take damage for Yvraine.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model gains Bodyguard, but only for the purpose of taking damage for Yvraine.

inlineRules.name: Protectors
inlineRules.shortDesc: Overwatches on 5+. With Pistols overwatches on 4+.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model Overwatches on a 5+. With Pistols it Overwatches on a 4+.

inlineRules.name: Shield Generator
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: target unit gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save.

inlineRules.name: Fear
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit must take a Fear Test.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: target unit must take a Fear Test. This is cast as a unit.

inlineRules.name: Unnatural Agility
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model inflicts a -1 To Hit penalty on attackers.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model inflicts a -1 To Hit penalty when attacking it.

inlineRules.name: Pinpoint Marksman
inlineRules.shortDesc: Enemy units must reroll successful Saves from Ranged Attacks from this model.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Enemy units must reroll successful Saves from Ranged Attacks from this model.

inlineRules.name: Ghostlight
inlineRules.shortDesc: Each weapon of this type may join fire with another: per joining weapon the lead gains Range+6, S+1, Heavy+1.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Each weapon in the squad with this rule may choose to join fire with another of its kind. For each weapon joining together, the lead designated weapon gains Range+6, S+1, and Heavy+1.

inlineRules.name: Aerobatic Grace
inlineRules.shortDesc: 4+ Cover Save.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 4+ Cover Save.

inlineRules.name: Weapon Platform
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model may move and shoot this weapon without penalty.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may move and shoot Heavy weapons without the normal To Hit penalty for moving.

inlineRules.shortDesc: This model inflicts a -1 Cover Save against its attacks.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model inflicts a -1 Cover Save against its attacks.

options.label: Any model — swap Vibro Cannon for

inlineRules.name: Linked Fire
inlineRules.shortDesc: Any other Prism Cannon in range may give up its shot to add S+2 Heavy+1 to this weapon.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Any other Prism Cannon within weapons range and Line of Sight to this Prism Cannon may give up its shot to add S+2 Heavy+1 to this Prism Cannon. If the Strength hits 13+ instead make it Destroyer.

inlineRules.name: Mindshock Probes
inlineRules.shortDesc: 12" Aura: target unit suffers Ld-2. Cast per model not per unit.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" Aura: target unit suffers Ld-2. Cast per model instead of per unit.

options.label: Any model — swap Pulse Laser for
Any model — swap Phoenix Missiles for

inlineRules.name: Defense Tactics
inlineRules.shortDesc: 12" True Aura: all Eldar Troop Slots may shoot as if not engaged in Melee when targeting units in their Melee range.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" True Aura: all Eldar Troop Slots may shoot as if not engaged in Melee so long as they target units within their Melee range.

inlineRules.name: Path of the Warrior
inlineRules.shortDesc: 12" True Aura: this model and all Dire Avenger units Overwatch on 4+ (3+ with Pistols).
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" True Aura: this model and all Dire Avenger units Overwatch on 4+, or 3+ if using Pistols.

inlineRules.name: Hand of Asuryan
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit gains 5+ Feel No Pain.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: target unit gains 5+ Feel No Pain.

inlineRules.name: Baharroth's Tempest
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Swooping Hawks gain Hit and Run. All Swooping Hawks gain Pinning on Ranged Attacks.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Swooping Hawks gain Hit and Run. All Swooping Hawks gain Pinning on Ranged Attacks.

inlineRules.name: First to Master Flight
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model and its unit do not Scatter when Deepstriking.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model and its unit do not Scatter when Deepstriking.

inlineRules.name: Assured Destruction
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Fire Dragons gain +1 on Vehicle Damage Tables.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Fire Dragons gain +1 on Vehicle Damage Tables.

inlineRules.name: Unquenchable Resolve
inlineRules.shortDesc: Gains S+1 and A+1 for each unsaved Wound. Cannot Heal.
inlineRules.fullDesc: For each unsaved Wound this model suffers, it gains S+1 and A+1. It cannot Heal from any source.

inlineRules.name: Banshee Howl
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Howling Banshees roll 3d6 for Charge Distance (max 12").
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Howling Banshees roll 3d6 when determining Charge Distance, but cannot exceed 12".

inlineRules.name: Duelist
inlineRules.shortDesc: May choose the target of its Challenge. Target may not deny. Reroll all failed To Hit and Wound in a Challenge.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may choose the target of its Challenge. The target may not deny the Challenge. While in a Challenge, this model may reroll all failed To Hit and Wound rolls.

inlineRules.name: Fear Aura
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit must take a Fear Test.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: target unit must take a Fear Test.

inlineRules.name: Hunter's Strike
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Striking Scorpions gain Scout.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Striking Scorpions gain Scout.

inlineRules.name: Microrift
inlineRules.shortDesc: One friendly unit per Round in Reserve may emerge within 6" of this model as if from a Webway Gate.
inlineRules.fullDesc: One friendly unit per Round in Reserve may emerge from Reserves within 6" of this model as if they had emerged from a Webway Gate.

inlineRules.name: Pushing the Warp Boundaries
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Warp Spiders may reroll all of the Warp Jump Generator dice.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Warp Spiders may reroll all of the Warp Jump Generator dice.

inlineRules.name: Inescapable Accuracy
inlineRules.shortDesc: This model inflicts a -1 Cover Save against its attacks.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model inflicts a -1 Cover Save against its attacks.

inlineRules.name: Manufactured Death
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Dark Reapers force targets to reroll successful cover saves.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target Dark Reapers force targets to reroll successful cover saves with their attacks.

inlineRules.name: Khaine Awakened
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit gain Counterattack, Fearless, Furious Charge, and Shock Assault.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: this model and target unit gain Counterattack, Fearless, Furious Charge, and Shock Assault.

inlineRules.name: Molten Body
inlineRules.shortDesc: Cannot be affected by Flame, Melta, or Beam weapons.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model cannot be affected by Flame, Melta, or Beam weapons.

inlineRules.name: Avatar of Ynnead
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" True Aura: for each model slain, roll d6. On 4+ gain +1 Wound (can exceed starting count).
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" True Aura: for each model slain, friend or foe, this model rolls a d6. On a 4+ it gains +1 Wound, even if it exceeds its starting Wound count.

inlineRules.name: Death Avatar
inlineRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit must take a Fear Test.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: target unit must take a Fear Test.

inlineRules.name: Distortion Rift
inlineRules.shortDesc: Each time after resolving where the Template lands, place a 7" Crater as Dangerous Terrain for the game.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Each time after resolving where the Template lands, place a 7" Crater that is Dangerous Terrain for the remainder of the game. Snap Shots and Overwatch do not place Craters.

options.label: Upgrade Distort Empaler to Turret mount

inlineRules.name: Spatial Rift
inlineRules.shortDesc: Each time after resolving where the Template lands, place a 10" Crater as Dangerous Terrain for the game.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Each time after resolving where the Template lands, place a 10" Crater that is Dangerous Terrain for the remainder of the game. Snap Shots and Overwatch do not place Craters.

choices.label: Phantom Glaive and 2 Linked Pulse Lasers

inlineRules.name: God Engine
inlineRules.shortDesc: May ignore all Monstrous Infantry, Infantry, and Swarms for movement purposes.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may ignore all Monstrous Infantry, Infantry, and Swarms for the purposes of Moving, Advancing, Falling Back, and Charging.

inlineRules.name: God Engine
inlineRules.shortDesc: May ignore all Monstrous Infantry, Infantry, and Swarms for movement purposes.
inlineRules.fullDesc: This model may ignore all Monstrous Infantry, Infantry, and Swarms for the purposes of Moving, Advancing, Falling Back, and Charging.

options.label: Swap either Heavy Wraith Cannon for

inlineRules.name: Webway
inlineRules.shortDesc: Any friendly unit may arrive from Reserve as if Disembarking from the Webway Gate. Access Front and Back.
inlineRules.fullDesc: Any friendly unit may arrive from Reserve as if it had Disembarked from the Webway Gate instead of normal. Access is on the Front and Back.
